title: taxillus umbellifer
intro: Taxillus umbellifer, also known as Loranthus umbellifer, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taxillus umbellifer include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Taxillus umbellifer is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a powder or capsule.
